item.title: Can two magnets orbit each other?
item.description: The Action Lab explores whether two magnets can orbit each other in this simple physics experiment.

media:content.media:title: Can two magnets orbit each other?
media:content.media:description: The Action Lab explores whether two magnets can orbit each other in this simple physics experiment.

item.title: Can you find the hidden variable?
item.description: In this video I show you what a hidden variable is and then show you a proof of Bell's Theorem that shows how we know that hidden variables don't exist in quantum mechanics

media:content.media:title: Can you find the hidden variable?
media:content.media:description: In this video I show you what a hidden variable is and then show you a proof of Bell's Theorem that shows how we know that hidden variables don't exist in quantum mechanics

item.title: Water moved without a pump
item.description: Magnetohydrodynamic drive moving water with no pump

media:content.media:title: Water moved without a pump
media:content.media:description: Magnetohydrodynamic drive moving water with no pump

item.title: How hot do black clothes get in the sun?
item.description: How black clothing responds to sunlight

media:content.media:title: How hot do black clothes get in the sun?
media:content.media:description: How black clothing responds to sunlight

item.title: Magnesium and dry ice
item.description: What happens when magnesium and dry ice are combined in a science experiment

media:content.media:title: Magnesium and dry ice
media:content.media:description: What happens when magnesium and dry ice are combined in a science experiment

item.title: Triangle-shaped wheels
item.description: How triangle-shaped wheels can move in an experiment about motion and physics.

media:content.media:title: Triangle-shaped wheels
media:content.media:description: How triangle-shaped wheels can move in an experiment about motion and physics.

item.description: Mini sonic booms in a physics experiment

item.title: Cooking without air
item.description: A science experiment about cooking without air.

media:content.media:title: Cooking without air
media:content.media:description: A science experiment about cooking without air.

item.title: Cutting water with a superhydrophobic knife
item.description: In this video I use a specially treated super hydrophobic knife to cut water droplets in half! I see how small of a water drop I can get!

media:content.media:title: Cutting water with a superhydrophobic knife
media:content.media:description: In this video I use a specially treated super hydrophobic knife to cut water droplets in half! I see how small of a water drop I can get!

item.title: The zombie ant experiment
item.description: In this video I show you how I made an ant think it was dead by putting a specific chemical on it that ants use to signal when they have died. This is how ants know to put the ants that have passed away into the ant graveyard.

media:content.media:title: The zombie ant experiment
media:content.media:description: In this video I show you how I made an ant think it was dead by putting a specific chemical on it that ants use to signal when they have died. This is how ants know to put the ants that have passed away into the ant graveyard.
